reference: WHEN I WAKED UP JUST AT DAYBREAK HE WAS SITTING THERE WITH HIS HEAD DOWN BETWIXT HIS KNEES MOANING AND MOURNING TO HIMSELF
text: when i waked up just at daybreak he was sitting there with his head down betwixt his knees moaning and moaning to himself and i waked up and i waked up and i waked up and i waked up
